name: Loaves and Fishes
oracleText:
When Loaves and Fishes enters the battlefield, create two 1/1 white Fish creature tokens with flying and a Food token.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice Loaves and Fishes: You gain 3 life.
flavorText: "They did all eat, and were filled." — Matthew 14:20
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Miracle of the Loaves and Fishes" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Miracle of the Loaves and Fishes
classics.sourceNotes: Best match for the multiplication miracle.
